description_long: This is a round, single-basin sink with a smooth, matte beige finish and an integrated faucet. The sink features a broad, oval rim with a ribbed draining area on one side, suitable for drying dishes or holding items. The faucet is tall and curved, positioned at the rear of the sink, with a single lever handle for water control. A small overflow hole is visible near the top of the basin, providing protection against accidental overfilling. The drain is centrally located at the bottom of the basin, and the overall design suggests a modern, utilitarian fixture suitable for outdoor or utility use. The structure appears to be made primarily of molded composite or resin, with metallic components for the faucet.
description: A round, beige single-basin sink with a ribbed draining area, integrated curved faucet, and central drain, finished in matte composite material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed draining area, faucet, and central basin with overflow hole visible.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the depth of the basin and the rear-mounted faucet with its handle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the faucet's curvature and the smooth, continuous rim of the sink.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the ribbed draining area and the faucet's attachment point.
